Class: OlMap

bemap.OlMap(context, target)

Base class for OpenLayers.

new OlMap(context, target)

Parameters:
Name Type Description
context bemap.Context BeMap-JS-API Context.
target string HTML element.
options.
Source:
  • bemap-ol/bemap-ol-v10/bemap-map-ol.js, line 15

Extends

  • bemap.Map

Members

(protected) _zoomControlVisible

Whether the zoom (+/-) control is currently visible. Initialised from the resolved `zoomControl` option (default OFF — opt-in) and flipped at runtime by `setZoomControl()`. Kept in sync so `getZoomControl()` is accurate before any runtime toggle.
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#_zoomControlVisible

_onError()

Subscribe to the map's error channel. Accepts the unfiltered channel `'error'` and three filtered channels: - `'error:auth'` — `UNAUTHORIZED` / `FORBIDDEN` - `'error:network'` — `NETWORK` / `OFFLINE` / `RATE_LIMITED` / `TILE_LOAD_FAILED` / `STYLE_LOAD_FAILED` - `'error:maplibre-only'`— `MAPLIBRE_ONLY` The library version of `on()` calls this when the event name starts with `'error'`; for other event names it delegates to the engine-specific implementation (see `LeafletMap.on`, `OlMap.on`, `MapLibreMap.on`).
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#_onError
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1462

(protected) _requiresGlobe()

Emit a one-time `info`-level error on the map's error channel when a `setLight` / `setSky` / etc. is called on a non-globe projection where the effect won't be visible. NOT auto-enabling globe — too surprising for a public API. The customer's error subscriber sees the hint; dev console gets a one-time `console.info`.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#_requiresGlobe
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1632

addDrawControl(options) → {bemap.Map}

Add a drawing toolbar to the map.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
options Object See below.
Properties
Name Type Description
polygon boolean Enable polygon drawing (default: true).
polyline boolean Enable polyline drawing (default: false).
rectangle boolean Enable rectangle drawing (default: false).
circle boolean Enable circle drawing (default: false).
marker boolean Enable marker drawing (default: false).
position String Toolbar position: 'topright','topleft','bottomright','bottomleft' (default: 'topright').
onDrawEnd function Callback when a shape is drawn.
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#addDrawControl
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1273

this

bemap.OlMap

clearAllEffects() → {bemap.Map}

Tear down every registered effect. Invokes each teardown in registration order, swallowing errors per-teardown so one failure doesn't block the rest. Each teardown is expected to call `_unregisterEffect` itself via the matching `remove*`/`stop*` path; the registry is cleared at the end regardless.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#clearAllEffects
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1605
Returns:
Type
bemap.Map

onEffectChange()

Subscribe to active-effect changes. Fires `{name, active}` whenever an effect is registered (`active: true`) or torn down (`active: false`). The dashboard's active-effects bar consumes this.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#onEffectChange
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1566

onGetFeatureInfo(layer, options) → {bemap.Listener}

Set get feature info call back.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
layer bemap.Layer set the bemap layer.
options object options.
Properties
Name Type Description
beforeCallback function callback called at data reception and before display the popup.
afterCallback function callback called after display the popup.
panningMap function enable the map panning animation. move map from the current position to the popup anchor at the center of map.
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#onGetFeatureInfo
Source:
  • bemap-ol/bemap-ol-v10/bemap-map-ol.js, line 883
Returns:
listner;

bemap.Listener

Rotation of map, set new angle of map.

Name Type Description

Type
bemap.Map

setStyle(urlOrSpec) → {bemap.OlMap}

Cross-engine `setStyle` for OL. The MapLibre wrapper has the same name but a richer contract (vector style name / URL / object); on Leaflet/OL "style" means the WMS theme or the raster tile source. The argument is interpreted as: • bare NAME (no '/' or ':') → re-applied as the WMS `STYLES` on the BeNomad TileWMS source(s) — the dark/light theme switch (`'benomadGrayLevel'` / `'benomadLight'`). Vector style names are MapLibre-only. • URL string (contains '/' or ':') → swaps the XYZ raster source URL. • inline style object → MapLibre-only; warn-once no-op here.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
urlOrSpec String | Object WMS style name, a raster URL template, or a MapLibre vector style object (no-op).
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#setStyle
Source:
  • bemap-ol/bemap-ol-v10/bemap-map-ol.js, line 1345
Returns:
this
Type
bemap.OlMap

bemap.OlMap(context, target)

Base class for OpenLayers.

Constructor

new OlMap(context, target)

Parameters:
Name Type Description
context bemap.Context BeMap-JS-API Context.
target string HTML element.
options.
Source:
  • bemap-ol/bemap-ol-v4/bemap-map-ol.js, line 17

Extends

  • bemap.Map

Members

(protected) _zoomControlVisible

Whether the zoom (+/-) control is currently visible. Initialised from the resolved `zoomControl` option (default OFF — opt-in) and flipped at runtime by `setZoomControl()`. Kept in sync so `getZoomControl()` is accurate before any runtime toggle.
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#_zoomControlVisible

Type
Object

_onError()

Subscribe to the map's error channel. Accepts the unfiltered channel `'error'` and three filtered channels: - `'error:auth'` — `UNAUTHORIZED` / `FORBIDDEN` - `'error:network'` — `NETWORK` / `OFFLINE` / `RATE_LIMITED` / `TILE_LOAD_FAILED` / `STYLE_LOAD_FAILED` - `'error:maplibre-only'`— `MAPLIBRE_ONLY` The library version of `on()` calls this when the event name starts with `'error'`; for other event names it delegates to the engine-specific implementation (see `LeafletMap.on`, `OlMap.on`, `MapLibreMap.on`).
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#_onError
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1462

options object options.
mode object Mode of slection feature.
Source:
  • bemap-ol/bemap-ol-v10/bemap-map-ol.js, line 781
Returns:
listener.

bemap.Listener

bemap.Listener

(protected) _requiresGlobe()

Emit a one-time `info`-level error on the map's error channel when a `setLight` / `setSky` / etc. is called on a non-globe projection where the effect won't be visible. NOT auto-enabling globe — too surprising for a public API. The customer's error subscriber sees the hint; dev console gets a one-time `console.info`.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#_requiresGlobe
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1632

Add a drawing toolbar to the map.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
options Object See below.
Properties
Name Type Description
polygon boolean Enable polygon drawing (default: true).
polyline boolean Enable polyline drawing (default: false).
rectangle boolean Enable rectangle drawing (default: false).
circle boolean Enable circle drawing (default: false).
marker boolean Enable marker drawing (default: false).
position String Toolbar position: 'topright','topleft','bottomright','bottomleft' (default: 'topright').
onDrawEnd function Callback when a shape is drawn.

bemap.OlMap

clearAllEffects() → {bemap.Map}

Tear down every registered effect. Invokes each teardown in registration order, swallowing errors per-teardown so one failure doesn't block the rest. Each teardown is expected to call `_unregisterEffect` itself via the matching `remove*`/`stop*` path; the registry is cleared at the end regardless.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#clearAllEffects
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1605
Returns:
Type
bemap.Map

onEffectChange()

Subscribe to active-effect changes. Fires `{name, active}` whenever an effect is registered (`active: true`) or torn down (`active: false`). The dashboard's active-effects bar consumes this.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#onEffectChange
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1566

onGetFeatureInfo(layer, options) → {bemap.Listener}

Set get feature info call back.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
layer bemap.Layer set the bemap layer.
options object options.
Properties
Name Type Description
beforeCallback function callback called at data reception and before display the popup.
afterCallback function callback called after display the popup.
panningMap function enable the map panning animation. move map from the current position to the popup anchor at the center of map.
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#onGetFeatureInfo
Source:
  • bemap-ol/bemap-ol-v10/bemap-map-ol.js, line 883
Returns:
listner;

rotation(angle, options) → {bemap.OlMap}

Rotation of map, set new angle of map.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
angle int in degrees, clockwise (matches MapLibre's setBearing convention; previously this method rotated counter-clockwise — that was the OL native direction but inconsistent with MapLibre, fixed in v2.0).
options Object Options (optional).
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#rotation
Deprecated:
  • Since 2.0 — use `setBearing(deg)` for a cross-engine API consistent with MapLibre's compass-bearing convention.
Source:
  • bemap-ol/bemap-ol-v10/bemap-map-ol.js, line 505
Returns:
this
Type

bemap.Map

setStyle(urlOrSpec) → {bemap.OlMap}

Cross-engine `setStyle` for OL. The MapLibre wrapper has the same name but a richer contract (vector style name / URL / object); on Leaflet/OL "style" means the WMS theme or the raster tile source. The argument is interpreted as: • bare NAME (no '/' or ':') → re-applied as the WMS `STYLES` on the BeNomad TileWMS source(s) — the dark/light theme switch (`'benomadGrayLevel'` / `'benomadLight'`). Vector style names are MapLibre-only. • URL string (contains '/' or ':') → swaps the XYZ raster source URL. • inline style object → MapLibre-only; warn-once no-op here.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
urlOrSpec String | Object WMS style name, a raster URL template, or a MapLibre vector style object (no-op).
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#setStyle
Source:
  • bemap-ol/bemap-ol-v10/bemap-map-ol.js, line 1345
Returns:
this
Type
bemap.OlMap

options object terrain options (source, exaggeration).

  • bemap.Map#setTerrain

setZoomControl(enabled) → {bemap.Map}

Show or hide the engine's native zoom (+/-) buttons at runtime. Uniform across Leaflet, OpenLayers and MapLibre — toggles a class on the map container so the engine-specific selectors all hit at once.

Name Type Description
enabled Boolean
Since:
  • 1.5.0
